channel.title: +Infection on hindu-vichArAH हिन्दु-विचाराः
channel.description: Recent content in +Infection on hindu-vichArAH हिन्दु-विचाराः

item.title: jake bilardi - atheist-boy
item.description: Source: TW Jake Bilardi : the “atheist” ISIS suicide bomber - Do you know any young boys and girls who claim to be atheists? Then you should read this.. Jake Billardi, from Melbourne, Australia was a shy 13 year old. He was a firm atheist and interested in political science. He wanted to be a political journalist. But his mother had recently passed away and he found out physics or chemistry didn’t give him spiritual succour.
